name: Can my small LA firm compete with big firms in AI recommendations?
description: Yes, target Avvo/Super Lawyers for consumer tiers in LA; ignore website SEO.[3]

mainEntity.name: Can my small LA firm compete with big firms in AI recommendations?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, target Avvo/Super Lawyers for consumer tiers in LA; ignore website SEO.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, by focusing on niche recognitions and consumer-tier directories like Avvo or Super Lawyers, which AI cites for certain practices.** In Los Angeles, AI results split by tier: institutional (Chambers) vs. consumer (Avvo, reviews), so small firms can dominate consumer queries. Firm websites remain invisible regardless of SEO. **Key factors:** 1) Target practice-specific directories; 2) Build review volume; 3) Consistent authority signals; 4) Avoid self-claims. Pursue verifiable listings in your area, reinforce via PR, and test queries to track progress. Small firms gain traction faster in consumer law areas.[3]
